name: Kundan Dome Jhumka Set
description: Golden kundan necklace with dome-shaped jhumkas and a detailed floral centerpiece with pearl drops.
stylistNotes: Ideal for sangeet or mehendi night. Goes best with gold embroidery outfits.
materialCare: Wipe gently with a dry cloth. Keep in a fabric-lined box.

name: Pastel Pearl Bridal Choker
description: A luxurious pearl choker with diamond embellishments and baby pink central stonework.
stylistNotes: Perfect for reception or pastel-themed weddings.
materialCare: Avoid exposure to direct sunlight and strong perfumes.

name: Heritage Kundan Bridal Set
description: An elaborate kundan choker with moon-shaped motifs, pearls, and layered detailing. Comes with matching earrings and maang tikka.
stylistNotes: Best for bridal wear or wedding functions with lehengas.
materialCare: Keep away from water and store flat to avoid bending.

name: Antique Pearl Drop Set
description: A traditional antique gold set with intricate carving and layered pearl drops.
stylistNotes: A timeless set to elevate simple silk sarees or anarkalis.
materialCare: Use a soft brush to clean between grooves. Avoid moisture.

name: Royal Diamond Polki Set
description: An opulent polki necklace with triangle and circular motifs, accompanied by heavy kundan earrings.
stylistNotes: Perfect for heavy bridal or engagement attire.
materialCare: Avoid impact or scratches. Store separately.

name: Emerald Kundan Layered Set
description: Triple-layered kundan necklace with green emerald stones. Comes with elegant matching earrings.
stylistNotes: Pairs well with deep green or cream sarees for royal vibes.
materialCare: Store flat. Clean gently with a soft cloth.

name: Azure Kundan Bridal Set
description: Soft pastel blue stone choker with pearls and kundan motifs. Includes matching earrings.
stylistNotes: Looks best with pastel lehengas or net sarees.
